assertions.assertion: Implements IClaimsTransformation with a TransformAsync method
assertions.rationale: IClaimsTransformation is documented in Microsoft docs

assertions.assertion: Creates a new ClaimsIdentity and adds it to the principal via principal.AddIdentity() — does NOT mutate the existing identity in-place
assertions.rationale: Without skill guidance, an LLM might cast to ClaimsIdentity and call AddClaim directly on the existing identity, missing the 'add new identity' best practice

assertions.assertion: Loads roles from a local repository or database based on the user's subject claim
assertions.rationale: The prompt explicitly asks for this, so any LLM would include it

assertions.assertion: Registers the implementation with DI (e.g. AddTransient<IClaimsTransformation, ...>)
Warns against using IClaimsTransformation on the IdentityServer host for modifying token claims
assertions.rationale: This is Duende-specific guidance that an LLM without the skill would not know to warn about
